environment_policy: scrub env to PATH/system temp only; set HOME and tool caches to temp; no token/key/secret/cookie/session variables
temp_copy_policy: copy source to TemporaryDirectory; exclude .git, node_modules, .venv, __pycache__, .DS_Store, AppleDouble files; materialize selected public git paths without copying .git

    "build": "tsc && node scripts/build-skill-bridge.mjs && node scripts/build-mcp-server.mjs && node scripts/build-bridge-entry.mjs && npm run compose-docs && npm run build:runtime-cli && npm run build:team-server && npm run build:cli",
